Fashion Fiesta: Minimum 40% off on top fashion brands including Levi's, Puma and Tommy Hilfiger. Free shipping on orders above Rs. 999. Promotional banner shown on PAX A910S POS terminals (campaign reference: SBI CAMPAIGN A910S).
